_comment: Hand-edit your holdings. Each entry needs a `ticker`; `shares` and `cost_basis` (total cost in your account currency) are optional and only used to label position size / unrealized P&L. The catalyst scanner reads this to build your dated add/trim calendar at /catalysts, and pushes a Feishu heads-up when an event is near. Seeded 2026-06-18 from David's Trading 212 ISA.

holdings.note: SpaceX — IPO'd Jun 2026; FMP may not yet cover earnings/dividend dates for a brand-new listing.
